problem id: a8ea0e29
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7)

examples:
  00010110 -> 00000000
  01110111 -> 10000000
  00011111 -> 10000000
  10011111 -> 10000000
  11010111 -> 10000000
  00011011 -> 10000000
  01111011 -> 10000000
  01110110 -> 00000000

query: 00101000
predicted answer: 00000000
